items.title: How to Make Golden Milk
items.summary: How to make golden milk: one cup raw milk or coconut milk, one tsp turmeric, pinch of black pepper, sea…
items.content_html:
How to make golden milk:
one cup raw milk or coconut milk, one tsp turmeric, pinch of black pepper, sea salt, cinnamon, and ginger, and sweetener to taste. Optional: you can add 1/2 tsp of ghee (for raw milk) or coconut oil (for coconut milk). Bring all the ingredients to a low simmer, not a boil, for 5-10 minutes, then enjoy hot or warm.

items.title: How to stop a cold sore fast
items.summary: Feel a cold sore coming? If you are currently experiencing an outbreak or feel one coming and are looking for…
items.content_html:
Feel a cold sore coming? If you are currently experiencing an outbreak or feel one coming and are looking for a quick fix before you begin the cure manual, you can use things you are likely to have lying around.

Apply ice to the area to cool down the tingling and slow down the sores. Once you've iced the area, apply some toothpaste to the area and leave on overnight. You can put a pimple patch or tiny band aid over the toothpaste if you don't want the toothpaste to be messy while you sleep or if you simply don't want anyone to ask questions. Doing this stops the breakout in its tracks. If you already have an existing breakout, you can still do the same, but with a bit more persistence since the sore is already there. You can also apply some pure tea tree oil diluted with a bit of coconut oil or olive oil. Please remember to wash your hands thoroughly with warm, soapy water before and after touching the affected area for at least 30 seconds.

items.title: You can say goodbye to cold sores forever. Yes, it is actually possible. For real.
items.summary: Have you ever had a cold sore? Has it made you feel embarrassed about being seen? Well, guess what? You're…
items.content_html:
Have you ever had a cold sore? Has it made you feel embarrassed about being seen? Well, guess what? You're not alone. And for so long you've had the burning question: Could cold sores ever go away? Well, the answer is yes! And, it's so much simpler than you think.

Listen, we just want you to know that you don't have to live with this issue anymore. You can actually do something good and permanent about it. There is hope. No longer would you have to feel insecure about going on dates or anxious about choosing a partner. No longer do you have to be worried about a breakout sneaking up on you. No longer do you have to keep a bunch of medicated lip balms lying around just in case. You don't have to accept this as your norm anymore. This may sound too good to be true and you are not at fault for thinking that. In fact, most people believe that there is no way to heal. After all, you've been told by countless medical professionals and Google searches that there is no cure. Well, the truth is, any disease can be healed.

According to the World Health Organization, approximately 64% of people around the world suffer from this annoying and embarrassing matter. The hard truth is: the culprit for those pesky breakouts is the herpes simplex virus or herpes for short. Breakouts can happen on your face or even…down there. While there are are about eight types of herpes, there are two main ones: HSV 1 and HSV 2. HSV 1 typically causes sores on the face while HSV 2 causes sores on the genital area. HSV 1 is the most common. Herpes is so sinister that you may have never had a cold sore outbreak, yet it is still possible that this virus is quietly using you as a host, making you asymptomatic. We believe that a great number of people carry this virus silently without knowing it because many people can get it from people they don't even know have it. That's because the virus still sheds without symptoms present. You might think it's no big deal since you don't get blisters or since you've managed to get rid of your outbreaks; however, for some, this virus can lead to more serious complications such as keratitis, encephalitis, meningitis, dementia, blindness, and other disorders. HSV can also increase your chance of contracting and transmitting HIV. The thing about the herpes virus is that it likes to hide out in discreet places in your body. It hijacks your cells, replicates rapidly and silently as it reshapes your DNA and causes damage.

In 2021, Marla Paul wrote in an article at Northwestern University Feinberg School of Medicine that, "more than half of U.S. adults are carriers of HSV1 (herpes simplex virus type 1) which hibernates in the peripheral nervous system and can never be eradicated." For decades, almost every single article or piece of literature have concluded that there is no cure for herpes. And, you too, have believed this to be true and have accepted a life sentence, subscribing to an indefinite membership of synthetic herpes medications. Frankly, most of those drugs are only meant to treat or suppress the sores. They are only designed to address surface symptoms and not the deep rooted causes of illness. And, honestly, that is just a form of imprisonment. Many even think that supplements like L-lysine healed them. The bad news is that, it hasn't. L-lysine is just an amino acid that blocks the outbreaks from physically manifesting but the virus is still laying low in your body. The good news is that this virus, though it has been deemed "incurable" for decades, is possible to eliminate. Now, while there is some truth that there is no "cure" to the herpes simplex virus (because you can't necessarily kill the virus), you can find it's hiding place and escort it out of your body. It is actually so much more straightforward than you think. That is why we created a step-by-step, easy to follow protocol (including videos and images) on how to locate and eradicate this virus and kick it out of your body for good. No bs. No fluff. Just a clear strategic plan. You can achieve real and lasting results. You'll not only be able to get rid of herpes, but you may find relief from other ailments as well. That is a win, win.

After years of research and dedication to disintegrating the myth that there is no way to heal from herpes, we have finally discovered and understood how this disease-causing virus operates and how to find and eradicate it. After dedicating over a year of research, we have compounded lots of information to get to this point, but won't bore you with pages upon pages of research details. Instead, we've managed to summarize the meat and potatoes—the most important aspects—for you. This has been so exciting because we are able to help people who have been desperate for a solution for a very long time. This was made with pure love and intention, just for you because you deserve it. You deserve to live a life of freedom. You deserve to be happy. You deserve to see the light at the end of the tunnel and we can't be more ecstatic for you! This for the person who has tried countless different ways to heal and is on the verge of giving up and just accepting their fate, but just know that "the most certain way to succeed is always to try just one more time." —Thomas Edison. Try one more time. You can get through this despite popular belief. You have power over your health. Take back control today!

Alright, so now here's the exciting part! A very significant ingredient in this remedy that we've discovered is carvacrol. This is the secret sauce of our protocol. Carvacrol is a powerful and natural antiviral, antifungal, and antimicrobial polyphenol agent that is found in a few herbs. It just works, period. And, with no side effect that is comparable to synthetic pharmaceutical medications but it must be used correctly. You will learn how to use it effectively in the protocol. The main and most common plant that contains potent carvacrol is oregano. But not just any oregano. There are two main kinds of oregano: Greek and Mexican. Mexican oregano is very well known. Most people use it in their seasoning rotation or on their favorite pizza; however, Mexican oregano has a very low and sometimes zero carvacrol content. Greek oregano, on the other hand, is true liquid gold. It grows wild in rocky and sunny Mediterranean hills and has a much higher carvacrol content averaging around 70%. Other alternative herbs that include high carvacrol content include thyme (specifically the thymus captitatus species) and Dittany of Crete. These are both Greek plants as well.

In our protocol, we will be using 100% Greek oil of oregano (also known as oregano essential oil), not oregano oil. There is a very big difference. It is also important to note that oil of oregano should be wild, steam distilled, 100% pure, undiluted and should have a Certificate of Analysis (COA) document to verify the potency, purity, and safety of the batch. There are plenty of oregano oils on the market with many claiming that their product is lab tested but have no COA and are often pre-diluted with olive oil or other oils. Additionally, many of them are not made from the plant species Origanum vulgare ssp. hirtum, which is true Greek oregano. We have found probably the best available oil of oregano product that is made and packaged in Greece but if you prefer to source your own, we encourage you to browse around to find other high quality alternatives as well, including Thymus Captitatus and Dittany of Crete. When selecting oil of oregano, you should know the species, the source (where it's grown), the carvacrol percentage, and the expiration date. For a limited time, we have included a complimentary full size oil with the purchase of our protocol at no additional cost to you. While supplies last!

In the protocol, you'll learn the specific ways that oil of oregano must be administered in order to expose and attack the herpes simplex virus. You will also be guided with exactly the types of foods and other supporting herbs to eat. Additionally, there are some vital steps that must be done prior to using the oil. You will learn exactly what to do in the protocol. We're confident that you can be healed as long as you follow the instructions and stick to the plan. Alright, it's time to break up with herpes for good! And, now that you have some insight, let's kick some…virass! You get it? Ah! Corny, we know. Anyway, if you are ready to kick the virus out and be freed from the stigma and shame, then you are at the right place.

Break the Cycle. For Good.

FAQs
Can the virus come back if I stop eating healthy?
People often ask if the virus will return if you adapt an unhealthy eating habit again. And the answer to that is no. However, if you do get exposed again to someone who is carrying the virus, it is possible that you can contract it again. What you need to understand is that bad diet didn't cause the virus, but bad diet made it easy to stay. When your body's defense—the immune system—is clogged up, pathogens sneak through much more easily and they stay and wreak havoc. But once you successfully eradicate the virus, start thinking thrice about who you exchange your next make out session or one night stand with.

How long does this process take to get rid of the virus?
While there is not an exact timeline, it all depends on each individual, igG test numbers, and how well the plan is adhered to. Remember that this is not a get fixed quick scheme. After all you're trying to eradicate something that has been hiding in you for a very long time. Be patient with the process and give yourself grace and time to heal. The sacrifice will be worth it in the end.

You don’t have to do both before and after but we recommend that you do at least the after. We want to hear from more voices of real people like you who have real results.
